_description: Accessible spacing tokens. Touch targets, focus ring offsets, and interactive element sizing follow WCAG 2.5.5 and WCAG 2.5.8.

spacing._note: Base unit: 4px (0.25rem). All values in rem.

touch-target._note: WCAG 2.5.5 (AAA) requires 44x44px minimum. WCAG 2.5.8 (AA, WCAG 2.2) requires 24x24px minimum.

comfortable.note: Comfortable for mobile — accounts for finger variance

focus-ring._note: WCAG 2.4.11 (AA, WCAG 2.2): focus indicator must have area >= perimeter of unfocused component × 2px, and contrast >= 3:1.

offset.note: Offset from element edge — prevents ring from being clipped by overflow:hidden

radius.note: Slightly rounded ring to visually match the element

content-width._note: WCAG 1.4.8 (AAA): no more than 80 characters per line. At 1rem = 16px, ~65ch ≈ 650px for proportional fonts.

prose.note: Optimal reading width — 65 characters per line

prose-wide.note: Wide reading width — for data-heavy content
